text:
On January 14, 2009 12:50 pm Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/dansguardian,
>
> Please note that PR ports/130561 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/130561

I approve of the patch, as I'm the one that submit it.  :)

Guess I should have submitted the maintainer e-mail change separately.

Trying to move my ports stuff off my work account to my gmail account.

-- 
Freddie Cash, LPIC-2 CCNT CCLP              WAN Specialist
